parameters.apprise_url_plus: whatsapp://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own WhatsApp destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise whatsapp:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native WhatsApp Cloud API {messaging_product, to, type, text} payload delivered straight to graph.facebook.com.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment WhatsApp destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to the WhatsApp Cloud API (no Apprise)

from_phone_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's WhatsApp from phone id

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's WhatsApp targets

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's WhatsApp token
